verses.text: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy to the church; we remember your 'work of faith, and labour of love.' Active faith. Their faith showed in work and love.
Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy to the church; we remember your 'work of faith, and labour of love.' Active faith. Their faith showed in work and love.
Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy to the church; we remember your 'work of faith, and labour of love.' Active faith. Their faith showed in work and love.
Knowing your election, for our gospel came 'in power, and in the Holy Ghost.' Powerful gospel. The word came with the Spirit's might.
Knowing your election, for our gospel came 'in power, and in the Holy Ghost.' Powerful gospel. The word came with the Spirit's might.
Ye became followers of us and the Lord, examples to all; from you 'sounded out the word.' Spreading example. Their faith echoed far abroad.
Ye became followers of us and the Lord, examples to all; from you 'sounded out the word.' Spreading example. Their faith echoed far abroad.
Ye became followers of us and the Lord, examples to all; from you 'sounded out the word.' Spreading example. Their faith echoed far abroad.
Ye 'turned to God from idols to serve the living... God; And to wait for his Son from heaven.' Turned and waiting. Conversion forsakes idols and looks for Christ.
